editor.lang_selection: Your language is set to English.

work_env.title: What do you preffer?
work_env.msg_1: You chose color background. If your mouse disappears use the command {45aaf2}/mouse
work_env.msg_2: You chose spawning. If your mouse disappears use the command {45aaf2}/mouse

reindex.title: Reorder Indexes
reindex.content_1: {ffffff}This will reorder your index to {f1c40f}"0, 1, 2, 3" {ffffff}if your index is something like {f1c40f}"0, 1, 2, 4"
reindex.content_2: {e74c3c}Warning: {ffffff}This will delete the undo and redo data. Do you want to perform this operation?
reindex.info: Indexes have been reordered. Select a textdraw to edit your textdrawings.

project.title: Project menu
project.error_name_exists: A project with that name already exists.

project_new.title: New project
project_new.text: {ffffff}Enter the name of the project you want to create:
project_new.error_1: You did not specify the project name.
project_new.error_2: The project name is too long.
project_new.error_3: There are invalid characters in the project name.
project_new.error_4: There is already a project with that name.
project_new.error_5: To create a new project, close the existing project.

project_action.title: Options
project_action.error_2: To load a new project close the existing project.
project_action.error_3: The project cannot be loaded because the database file has not been found.
project_action.warn_content: {FFFFFF}Are you sure you want to delete the project?
project_action.warn_error: You need to close the project first.

import.title: Import
import.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the name of the file you want to import.
import.error_1: You need to create a project before importing a textdraw.
import.error_2: You have not entered the name of the file to be imported.
import.error_3: No file found with the name "%s".
import.error_4: The import was interrupted because the textdraw limit was reached.
import.info: File "%s" imported. [Global TDs: %s, Player TDs: %s, Total: %s]

export.title: Export
export.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the name of the file you want to export.
export.content_2: If you dont specify a file name, you will get the output as "%s.txt".
export.error2: You must create or load a project for the export process.
export.info: Project "%s.txt" exported. [Global TDs: %s, Player TDs: %s, Total: %s]

close_project.error: To close a project you must have one loaded.

var_global.title: Default variable name
var_global.content_1: {FFFFFF}Specifies the variable name of the output you will receive when exporting your project.
var_global.content_2: {FFFFFF}Leave the screen blank to set the default variable name.
var_global.error: The variable name is too long.
var_global.info: The default variable name is set to %s.

swap_index.title: Change Index
swap_index.content: {ffffff}Enter the index number you want to change. {3498db}(0, %s)

var_name.title: Edit variable name
var_name.content_1: {ff7979}Note: {FFFFFF}Leave the box blank to remove the variable name.
var_name.content_2: {ffffff}Enter the variable name you want to use for this textdraw.
var_name.error: The variable name is too long.
var_name.info: The variable name is set to %s.
var_name.info2: The variable name has been removed.

size.title: Manual editing
size.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the new values you want to use.

text.title: Text
text.content2: {ffffff}Enter the text you want to use.

outline_shadow.title: Manual edit
outline_shadow.content_2: {FFFFFF}Enter the value you want to use. Type {f9ca24}0 {FFFFFF} to remove.

color_hex.title: Color: Hex
color_hex.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the hex code of the color you want to use.
color_hex.error: The hex code you entered is incorrect.

color_rgb.title: Color: RGB
color_rgb.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the RGB code of the color you want to use.
color_rgb.error: The RGB code you entered is incorrect.

color_rgba.title: Color: RGBA
color_rgba.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the RGBA code of the color you want to use.
color_rgba.error: The RGBA code you entered is incorrect.

preview_models_manual.title: Manual edit
preview_models_manual.content_1: {FFFFFF}Enter the value you want to use.

undo_redo.title: Undo and Redo
undo_redo.content_1: Choose the index you want to show. The index can be from {ff7979}1 {ffffff}to {ff7979}#%d

undo_redo_confirm.title: Confirm Changes
undo_redo_confirm.content_1: {FFFFFF}Are you sure you want the confirm the changes?

deleted.title: Deleted textdraws [%s / %s]
deleted.info: TextDraw has been restored. New index number: %s

deleted_clear.title: Erase all data
deleted_clear.content_1: {ff7f50}Warning: {FFFFFF}This operation will delete the data of all textdraws you have deleted.

deleted_restore.title: Restore all data
deleted_restore.content_1: {FFFFFF}Are you sure you want to restore all data?
deleted_restore.info: All data has been restored. Total data: %s

grouping.error: Create a textdraw to use this feature.
grouping.title: Grouping
grouping.error_2: No text item found between groups.
grouping.info_2: All textdraws have been removed from group.
grouping.info_5: Preview Model TextDraws have been grouped.
grouping.info_6: Grouped textdraws were copied. Total copied textdraws: %s
grouping.info_7: The grouped textdraws have been copied and selected. Total copied textdraws: %s
grouping.info_8: All grouped textdraws have been deleted. Total deleted textdraws: %s
grouping.info_9: Updated position of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_10: Updated text size of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_11: Changed text of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_12: Changed font of all grouped textdraws to %s.
grouping.info_13: Changed alignment of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_14: Changed proportion of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_15: Changed color of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_16: Changed box value of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_17: Changed selectable value of all grouped textdraws.
grouping.info_18: Changed Global / Player value of all grouped textdraws.

group_text.title: Text change
group_text.content: {FFFFFF}Enter the new text of the grouped items.

group_outline.title: Outline
group_outline.content: {FFFFFF}Enter the outline value you want to use.
group_outline.info: The outline value of grouped textdraws is set to %s.

group_shadow.title: Shadow
group_shadow.content: {FFFFFF}Enter the shadow value you want to use.
group_shadow.info: The shadow value of grouped textdraws is set to %s.

interactive.start: Arrow keys: {0}. ENTER: save. N: manual.
interactive.start_pmodel: Arrow keys: change value. ENTER: save. N: manual.
interactive.start_undo: LEFT/RIGHT: browse. ENTER: confirm. N: jump.
interactive.start_swap: LEFT/RIGHT: swap. ENTER: confirm. N: manual.
interactive.start_gpos: Arrow keys: move grouped. ENTER: save.
